targets.notes: Publicly communicated as part of “Apple 2030” covering product life cycle and supply chain; remaining emissions intended to be addressed with carbon removal/offsetting.
targets.title: Apple 2030: reduce absolute greenhouse gas emissions 75% by 2030 (vs. 2015 baseline) across full footprint

targets.notes: Often described as “carbon neutral for our entire footprint by 2030,” with a plan to cut emissions substantially (e.g., 75%) and use carbon removal for remaining emissions.
targets.title: Apple 2030: carbon neutral across entire business (full footprint) by 2030

targets.notes: Public claim that corporate operations are carbon neutral starting in 2020; scope coverage details vary by reporting and are not specified here.
targets.title: Corporate operations carbon neutral (achieved/maintained from 2020)
